probe_parameters.sam_header_length_normalization: raw LN modulo 2^31; the SRA Lite sam-dump header contains a reproducible 10*2^31 offset
probe_parameters.transcription_strand_inference: disabled because archive metadata does not state the first/second-strand orientation convention
probe_parameters.quality_gate_limitations: no controlled read remapping; submitted NH/NM/CIGAR values are diagnostic only; controlled uniqueness, splice evidence, true unmappable reads and contamination remain unavailable
